candidates.notes: Strong baseline established. Clear difficulty progression confirms Arrhenius theory predictions.

key_findings: Qwen2.5-Math-7B achieves 47% accuracy on MATH pilot (100 samples)
Accuracy strongly correlates with MATH difficulty level (100% L1 -> 20% L5)
Model can solve ~50% of problems in single pass, validating routing potential
Activation Energy Theory supported: harder problems need more samples
next_steps: Run G1 saturation curve (k=1,2,4,8,16) to validate Arrhenius kinetics
Extract per-problem Ea from consistency signals
Test routing strategy on low-Ea problems
